compiled_state.title: [bridge-alert-display]: test_ticket_show_outputs_health_warning_when_unresolved_alerts -> assertion failure on clean main
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

**Scenario Type**: Pre-existing test failure (unrelated to recent session work)
**Source**: Discovered during /dso:end-session test gate run on 2026-04-27.

**Expected Behavior**: tests/scripts/test_bridge_alert_display.py::test_ticket_show_outputs_health_warning_when_unresolved_alerts asserts that ticket-show output includes a health warning when unresolved alerts exist.

**Actual Behavior**: Fails on clean origin/main; verified pre-existing via 'git stash' baseline.

**Investigation Plan**: Reproduce, capture actual stdout, identify whether the warning emission was removed or never landed; align test or implementation.

comments.body: Fixed: test used GIT_DIR env var which ticket-show.sh doesn't handle (unlike ticket-list.sh which has a GIT_DIR dirname fallback). Changed to TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR which ticket-show.sh explicitly supports as a test escape hatch.
comments.author: Test
